_comment_coalition: Aligned with FeedOracle hybrid-PQC fixture (x402-foundation/x402#2357 coalition). Shared payment_hash + action_ref demonstrate the three-axis interop binding works byte-for-byte between independent runtimes.
_comment_payment_hash: SHA-256(utf8('x402-payment-base-0xUSDC-50000-base-mainnet-demo')). Shared with FeedOracle fixture verbatim ; documents a hypothetical x402 USDC-Base settlement for fixture purposes only.
_comment_action_ref: SHA-256(utf8(action_ref_preimage_jcs)) per RFC 8785 JCS canonicalisation. Shared with FeedOracle fixture verbatim. 32-byte work-proof binding per x402-foundation/x402#2332 andysalvo TrailRecord pattern, cross-referenced in #2357. Cross-layer property: mutating one byte of the preimage flips the digest on BOTH sides.
_comment_inner_receipt: SettlementReceipt with deterministic fields: payment_id UUID v4 nil-derived, tx_hash fixture label, block_number 9786058 (Starknet Sepolia fixture block), settled_at 1700000005 (Unix epoch 2023-11-14T22:13:25Z).
_comment_bound_receipt_cbor_b64: base64url-no-pad (RFC 4648 §5) of canonical CBOR (RFC 8949 §4.2.1) of BoundReceipt<SettlementReceipt>. Total encoded size: 263 chars (197 CBOR bytes before base64). Computed by crates/zkpay-x402/examples/compute-fixture.rs using ciborium 0.2 + vauban-zkpay-x402 0.1.0.
_comment_cbor_hex: Same bytes as bound_receipt_cbor_b64 in lowercase hex for diff-friendly inspection.

_axis_2_feedoracle_hybrid_pqc.description: FeedOracle hybrid-PQC receipt: ES256K + ML-DSA-65 (FIPS 204) over identical JCS-canonical bytes, carrying the SAME payment_hash and action_ref as this vector. Verifier: verify_receipt.py in the gist, offline-checkable against public JWKS at https://tooloracle.io/.well-known/jwks.json.
_axis_2_feedoracle_hybrid_pqc.binding_property: Both signatures cover canonical bytes that include the shared payment_hash + action_ref. Mutating either invalidates both signatures.

_axis_3_andysalvo_action_ref_verify.description: andysalvo (TrailRecord, x402-foundation/x402#2332) action-ref-verify harness would consume the shared action_ref_preimage_jcs above, recompute SHA-256(JCS(preimage)) per RFC 8785, and assert equality with action_ref_hex. Repository: https://github.com/andysalvo/action-ref-verify.

_conformance_failure_cases.case_1_work_layer_binding_break: Flip one byte of action_ref_preimage_jcs ; SHA-256 digest changes ; the cross-layer binding to this STARK receipt and to FeedOracle's hybrid-PQC receipt both detect the mutation. Demonstrates the work-proof binding is independent of the integrity layer.
_conformance_failure_cases.case_2_receipt_integrity_break: Flip one byte of bound_receipt_cbor_hex ; CBOR decode either fails or yields a different action_ref ; the STARK receipt no longer matches the on-chain payment_hash. For FeedOracle's side: both ES256K and ML-DSA-65 verifications fail since both sign the identical canonical bytes.
